Home.collectedWithConsent: This review was collected from the customer with their consent.
Home.qualityShippingDesc: Free shipping on all orders within the region
Home.qualityFabricDesc: Only the finest materials sourced for our abayas
Home.qualityTailoringDesc: Handcrafted with attention to every detail
Home.qualitySupportDesc: Personal styling advice and aftercare support
Home.faqShippingA: We offer complimentary shipping on all orders. Delivery within the UAE takes 2-4 business days. International delivery takes 5-10 business days depending on your location.
Home.faqReturnsA: We accept exchanges within 7 days of delivery for items in their original condition with tags attached. Custom-made pieces are not eligible for exchange. Please contact our support team to initiate an exchange.
Home.faqSizing: How do I find my size?
Home.faqSizingA: Each product page includes a detailed size guide. You can also book a free virtual styling consultation where our experts will help you find the perfect fit.
Home.faqCustomA: Yes! You can provide your custom measurements when adding items to your cart. Our tailors will create a piece perfectly fitted to your body.
Home.faqCare: How should I care for my abaya?
Home.faqCareA: We recommend dry cleaning for all our abayas. Store them on a padded hanger in a garment bag. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve the fabric color.
Home.faqMaterials: What materials are your abayas made from?
Home.faqMaterialsA: We use only premium fabrics including French crepe, Italian silk, Nidha, and premium chiffon. Each product page specifies the exact fabric composition so you can choose the perfect material for your needs.
Home.faqGiftA: Yes! Every order arrives in our signature luxury packaging at no extra cost. If you'd like a personalized handwritten card included, simply leave your message in the order notes at checkout and we'll prepare it with love.
Home.faqAlterations: Can I request alterations after purchase?
Home.faqAlterationsA: We offer one complimentary alteration within 14 days of delivery for standard length adjustments. For more complex alterations, please contact our support team and we will do our best to accommodate your request.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Where Tradition Meets Modern Elegance
About.story: Design By Shoug was born from a passion for creating abayas that celebrate the beauty of modest fashion. Each piece in our collection is thoughtfully designed to blend timeless tradition with contemporary aesthetics, empowering women to express their individuality with grace and confidence.
About.story2: Founded with a vision to redefine modest wear, we believe that elegance should never compromise comfort. Our abayas are crafted with premium fabrics and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring every garment tells a story of sophistication and artistry.
About.mission: To create elegant, high-quality abayas that inspire confidence and celebrate the art of modest fashion. We are committed to craftsmanship, quality, and timeless design.
About.value1Desc: Every piece is meticulously crafted with attention to detail and premium materials.
About.value2Desc: We design with purpose, creating pieces that embody sophistication and grace.
About.value3Desc: We celebrate personal style and create pieces that let you express your unique identity.
About.value4Desc: From fabric selection to finishing touches, quality is at the heart of everything we do.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, contact us, or otherwise communicate with us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment information.
privacy.s2Body: We use the information we collect to process your orders, communicate with you about your purchases, send you marketing communications (with your consent), improve our services, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties except as needed to complete your order (e.g., shipping carriers, payment processors) or as required by law.
privacy.s4Body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s5Body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to understand and save your preferences for future visits, keep track of advertisements, and compile aggregate data about site traffic and interaction. These include first-party cookies essential for site functionality and third-party cookies from our analytics and advertising partners.
privacy.s6Body: We use Microsoft Clarity to understand how visitors interact with our website. Clarity collects behavioral data such as heatmaps, session recordings, and scroll maps. This data is anonymous and does not include personally identifiable information. Clarity may use cookies and similar technologies to collect this data. For more information, visit Microsoft's privacy policy at https://privacy.microsoft.com/en-us/privacystatement.
privacy.s7Body: We use the Meta (Facebook) Pixel to measure the effectiveness of our advertising and to show you relevant ads. The Pixel collects information about your actions on our website, such as page views, adding items to cart, and completing purchases. This data is shared with Meta and may be used to serve you personalized ads on Facebook and Instagram. For more information, visit Meta's data policy at https://www.facebook.com/privacy/policy/.
privacy.s8Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time by contacting us or using the unsubscribe link in our emails. To opt out of Meta Pixel tracking, you can adjust your ad preferences in your Facebook settings. To opt out of Clarity tracking, you may use your browser's Do Not Track setting or disable cookies.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using our website and purchasing our products, you agree to these terms and conditions.
terms.s1Body: By accessing and using our website, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our website.
terms.s2Body: We strive to display accurate product information and pricing. However, errors may occur. We reserve the right to correct any errors and to change or update information at any time without prior notice. All prices are in AED (United Arab Emirates Dirham).
terms.s3Body: By placing an order, you are making an offer to purchase the products selected. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason, including suspected fraud or unauthorized transactions.
terms.s4Body: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Design By Shoug and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or use any content without our written permission.
terms.s5Body: Design By Shoug shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or products. Our total liability shall not exceed the purchase price of the product in question.

returns.title: Exchange Policy
returns.intro: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy, we're here to help.
returns.s1Body: Items may be exchanged within 7 days of delivery, provided they are unworn, unwashed, and in their original condition with all tags attached. Custom or made-to-order items are not eligible for exchange.
returns.s2Body: To initiate an exchange, please contact our customer service team via email or WhatsApp with your order number and reason for exchange. We will provide you with exchange instructions and a return shipping address.
returns.s3Body: If you wish to exchange an item for a different size or color, please contact us within 7 days of receiving your order. Exchanges are subject to availability.
returns.s4Body: If you receive a damaged or defective item, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the issue. We will arrange a replacement at no additional cost.
returns.s5Body: If you have any questions about our exchange policy, please contact our customer service team via email or WhatsApp. We are happy to assist you with any concerns.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.intro: We ship across the UAE and internationally. Please review our shipping details below.
shipping.s1Body: We offer shipping across all emirates in the UAE. Standard delivery takes 2-4 business days. Express delivery (1-2 business days) is available for select areas at an additional cost.
shipping.s2Body: Complimentary shipping is available on all orders. No minimum purchase required.
shipping.s3Body: We currently ship to select countries in the GCC region. International delivery typically takes 5-10 business days depending on the destination. Shipping rates and delivery times vary by country and will be calculated at checkout.
shipping.s4Body: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can use this to track your package online.
shipping.s5Body: If you experience any issues with your delivery, please contact our customer service team. We are not responsible for delays caused by customs, weather, or other circumstances beyond our control.

Policies.intro: At Design By Shoug, we are committed to providing you with the best shopping experience. Please read our policies carefully.
Policies.privacyIntro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
Policies.termsIntro: By using our website and purchasing our products, you agree to these terms and conditions.
Policies.returnsIntro: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. Exchanges are available within 7 days of delivery for items in their original condition.
Policies.shippingIntro: We ship across the UAE and internationally. Please review our shipping details below.

SizeGuide.title: Size Guide
SizeGuide.subtitle: Find your perfect fit with our comprehensive measurement guide
SizeGuide.howToMeasureDesc: Use a soft measuring tape and wear lightweight clothing. Stand naturally with your arms at your sides.
SizeGuide.bustDesc: Measure around the fullest part of your bust, keeping the tape horizontal and snug but not tight.
SizeGuide.waistDesc: Measure around the narrowest part of your natural waistline, typically about an inch above your navel.
SizeGuide.hipsDesc: Stand with your feet together and measure around the fullest part of your hips and buttocks.
SizeGuide.lengthDesc: Measure from the top of your shoulder (where the seam would sit) down to your desired length. Most abayas fall to the ankle or floor.
SizeGuide.shoulderDesc: Measure from the edge of one shoulder across your back to the edge of the other shoulder.
SizeGuide.sleeveDesc: Measure from the shoulder seam down the outside of your arm to your wrist.
SizeGuide.lengthNote: Choose your preferred length based on your height and styling preference.
SizeGuide.whereToSpecifyDesc: When adding an abaya to your cart, you'll see options to select your preferred abaya length. For custom measurements, choose "Custom" and enter your exact measurements. Our tailors will craft your abaya to your specifications.
SizeGuide.customDesc: Need a truly personalized fit? Select the custom option at checkout and provide your exact bust, waist, hips, shoulder width, sleeve length, and desired abaya length. Our master tailors will create a piece made just for you.
SizeGuide.videoDesc: Follow along with our step-by-step video guide to ensure accurate measurements at home.

FAQPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our abayas, ordering, and services
FAQPage.shippingA1: We offer complimentary shipping on all orders. Delivery within the UAE takes 2-4 business days. GCC delivery takes 5-7 business days. International delivery to other countries takes 7-14 business days depending on your location.
FAQPage.shippingA2: Yes, we ship to all GCC countries (Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia) and select international destinations. Shipping rates and times vary by country and are calculated at checkout.
FAQPage.shippingQ3: How can I track my order?
FAQPage.shippingA3: Once your order is shipped, you'll receive a confirmation email with a tracking number and link. You can also check your order status in your account under 'My Orders'.
FAQPage.shippingQ4: What if I'm not home for delivery?
FAQPage.shippingA4: Our courier will attempt delivery up to 3 times. You'll receive an SMS with rescheduling options. You can also provide a safe place or alternative address instructions at checkout.
FAQPage.shippingVideoDesc: See how we carefully package and ship your abayas to ensure they arrive in perfect condition.
FAQPage.sizingQ1: How do I find my size?
FAQPage.sizingA1: Check our Size Guide page for a detailed body measurement chart and abaya length guide. Each product page also has size and length selectors to help you choose.
FAQPage.sizingA2: Absolutely! Select the "Custom" option when choosing your size, and enter your exact measurements. Our tailors will create your abaya to your specifications with no extra charge.
FAQPage.sizingQ3: What measurements do I need for a custom abaya?
FAQPage.sizingA3: For a perfect custom fit, you'll need: bust, waist, hips, shoulder width, sleeve length, and desired abaya length. Visit our Size Guide page for a step-by-step video on how to measure yourself.
FAQPage.sizingQ4: What if the abaya doesn't fit?
FAQPage.sizingA4: We offer one complimentary alteration within 14 days of delivery for standard length adjustments. If there's a significant sizing issue, contact us and we'll arrange a replacement.
FAQPage.sizingVideoDesc: Follow our step-by-step guide to taking accurate body measurements at home for the perfect fit.
FAQPage.productsQ1: What materials are your abayas made from?
FAQPage.productsA1: We use only premium fabrics including French crepe, Italian silk, Nidha, premium chiffon, and Japanese satin. Each product page specifies the exact fabric composition.
FAQPage.productsQ2: How should I care for my abaya?
FAQPage.productsA2: We recommend dry cleaning for all our abayas. Store them on a padded hanger in a garment bag. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve the fabric color. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth.
FAQPage.productsQ3: Are your abayas suitable for all occasions?
FAQPage.productsA3: Yes! Our collection ranges from everyday essentials to statement pieces for special occasions. Each product description includes styling suggestions to help you choose the right abaya.
FAQPage.productsA4: We launch new collections seasonally, with limited-edition pieces throughout the year. Subscribe to our newsletter or follow us on Instagram to be the first to know about new arrivals.
FAQPage.ordersQ1: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQPage.ordersA1: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Cash on Delivery (COD) within the UAE. All online payments are processed securely.
FAQPage.ordersQ2: Can I cancel or modify my order?
FAQPage.ordersA2: You can cancel or modify your order within 2 hours of placing it. After that, production may have started. Please contact us immediately via WhatsApp or email.
FAQPage.ordersA3: Yes! Every order arrives in our signature luxury packaging at no extra cost. If you'd like a personalized handwritten card included, simply leave your message in the order notes at checkout and we'll prepare it with love.
FAQPage.ordersQ4: Can I use a promo code?
FAQPage.ordersA4: Yes, enter your promo code in the coupon field at checkout. The discount will be applied to your order total. Only one promo code can be used per order.
FAQPage.returnsA1: We accept exchanges within 7 days of delivery for items in their original condition with tags attached. Custom-made pieces are not eligible for exchange. Please contact our support team to initiate an exchange.
FAQPage.returnsQ2: How do I initiate an exchange?
FAQPage.returnsA2: Contact our customer service team via email or WhatsApp with your order number and reason for exchange. We'll provide exchange instructions and a shipping address.
FAQPage.returnsQ3: Can I exchange for a different size?
FAQPage.returnsA3: Yes, you can exchange for a different size or color within 7 days of receiving your order, subject to availability. Contact us to arrange an exchange.
FAQPage.craftVideoTitle: Watch: How We Craft Your Abaya
FAQPage.craftVideoDesc: Take a behind-the-scenes look at how our master tailors create each abaya with precision and care.
